name: Lemon Poppy Seed Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all cake ingredients.
3. Beat on low speed until all ingredients are moistened, scraping the sides of the bowl often.
4. Increase speed to high and beat until smooth (1-2 minutes).
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 12-cup Bundt pan or 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
8. Let cool completely.
9. In a small bowl, stir together powdered sugar and lemon juice until smooth.
10. Drizzle glaze over the cooled cake.
NUTRITION INFORMATION: (1 serving): Calories 340; Protein 5g; Carbohydrates 51g; Fat 14g; Cholesterol 85mg; Sodium 260mg.
